title: Noah Lucas homepage border cleanup, cinematic fade, and delayed video staging
changeSummary: Keeps a single outer one-pixel frame while removing inner card side/bottom rims, including high-specificity regular-glass cards.
Delays carousel video playback until 10 seconds after page load.
Restores cinematic fade on first page load.
Restores visible black fade on day-to-night theme transitions.
Uses hosted mappings for large visual assets so publish artifacts stay small.
Staged for PNG review; production pointer is unchanged.

checks: awaiting staging browser screenshots and behavior checks
